title: Bewised
description: Optimized pack with latest fun stuff that works on any server
body:
![The logo made from minecraft title generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c38b4bc6c65ec1b12e9ea804c426933c226f2323.png)


# Description 
Optimized mod with a bunch off latest cool mods

You can listen stuff with water player mod if you want

Or activate all the pvp shenanigans i installed

# Features

Using my genious brain ( sort by latest uploaded ). i found cool mods people never talk about that have cool combinations

- Sodium stuff
- Server optimization stuff
- Creating local server with remotely magic
- Cool particle stuff
- Water player , Online music player
- Bewis mod ( best pvp utils mod ngl )
- Axiom & World edit for epic builder
- Viafabric , basically you can join any server. even bedrock ig
- Resourceify , download texture and shader directly ingame
- Physics mod

# Extra

Comes with my top 10 music playlist ( really cool )

![top 10 playlist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9792842b142fccd74f8f153df90b039d8a4725f0_0.webp)

And other texture pack ig ( you can upload or download more by pressing 2 of those )

![texturepack wow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfd76267b3eebbc59739d6cd1bef71572722340c.png)


# Support
I clearly dont own anything and you guys should support the mod authors listed in the mods

Very w of them
